description: Crafted from soft leather, this dark chocolate brown wallet from turtle is fabulously stylish and well organized. This two-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday useDimensions: 11.5 cm X 9.5 cmHas two main compartmentsFour credit card slots on the left side flap above another cred it card organizer held together with a snap button flapZippered chamberOne compartments on the left for coins with a snap button flapCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
